description: A colleague imported a dive but misspelled the dive site as 'Yelow House' instead of 'Yellow House'. Because Subsurface treats dive sites as distinct relational entities, the statistics for 'Yellow House' are now split across two different site records in the database. Consolidate the 'Yelow House' and 'Yellow House' dive site records into a single correctly spelled 'Yellow House' entity. Ensure all dives for this location are grouped under the single correct site entity and that no duplicate site entities remain. Save the dive log.
